security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Open-source visual IDE for Maestro mobile tests
bundle.longDescription: Maestro Deck is a fast, offline, open-source visual editor for creating Maestro mobile UI test flows. No login, no telemetry, no cloud.
